title: Data Management for Researchers
abstract: Learn how to structure and document your raw research data for peer reviews.

title: Module 2: Open Science and Data Sharing
abstract: Learn how to make your research data findable, accessible, and compliant with open science mandates.

title: Module 3: Long-Term Data Preservation
abstract: The final step focuses on archiving data securely for 10+ years and submitting your final DMP report.

title: Data Governance for Managers
abstract: Learn how to manage data access, compliance, and team workflows.

title: Teaching Data Management
abstract: Learn how to deliver engaging training sessions on data management principles.
